// Generated by bpmn-to-code

export interface BpmnTimer {
  type: string;
  timerValue: string;
}

export interface BpmnError {
  name: string;
  code: string;
}

export interface BpmnEscalation {
  name: string;
  code: string;
}

export interface BpmnFlow {
  id: string;
  sourceRef: string;
  targetRef: string;
  condition?: string;
  isDefault?: boolean;
}

export interface BpmnRelations {
  incoming: string[];
  outgoing: string[];
  parentId: string | null;
  attachedToRef: string | null;
  attachedElements: string[];
}

export interface ProcessApi {
  PROCESS_ID: string;
  PROCESS_ENGINE: string;
  Elements: Record<string, string>;
  CallActivities?: Record<string, string>;
  Messages?: Record<string, string>;
  TaskTypes?: Record<string, string>;
  Timers?: Record<string, BpmnTimer>;
  Errors?: Record<string, BpmnError>;
  Escalations?: Record<string, BpmnEscalation>;
  Compensations?: Record<string, string>;
  Signals?: Record<string, string>;
  Variables?: Record<string, Record<string, string>>;
  Flows?: Record<string, BpmnFlow>;
  Relations?: Record<string, BpmnRelations>;
  Variants?: Record<string, {
    Flows?: Record<string, BpmnFlow>;
    Relations?: Record<string, BpmnRelations>;
  }>;
}
